_comment: Telegram bot token pool for Realtor Assistant. Create new bots via @BotFather on Telegram.
_how_to_create: Message @BotFather on Telegram, send /newbot, follow prompts. Paste the token below.
_in_use: Currently assigned to a realtor instance
_instructions: NEVER COMMIT REAL TOKENS. Use this file as a template. Actual tokens go in .env on each instance.
